zh.Rougham, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆
zh.Rougham,, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆
zh.Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Drury於1479年出生在英國素福爾可盧加姆時，他的父親John Drury-8歲，母親Margaret Felton32歲。他於大約1521年與Elizabeth Goldingham在英國素福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Drury于1479年出生在英国素福爾可盧加姆时，他的父亲John Drury-8岁，母亲Margaret Felton32岁。他于大约1521年与Elizabeth Goldingham在英国素福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): variant of   Drury  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Drury was born in 1479, in Rougham, Suffolk, England, his father, John Drury, was -8 and his mother, Margaret Felton, was 32. He married Elizabeth Goldingham about 1521, in Rougham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1556, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Drury est né en 1479, à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Drury, avait -8 ans et sa mère, Margaret Felton, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Goldingham environ 1521, à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1556, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Drury 1479 in Rougham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Drury -8 und seine Mutter Margaret Felton 32. Er hat um 1521 in Rougham, Suffolk, England Elizabeth Goldingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1556 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Drury è nato il nel 1479 nel Rougham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Drury, aveva -8 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Felton, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Goldingham circa 1521, nel Rougham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1556, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Druryが1479年にイギリススフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父John Druryは-8歳，母Margaret Feltonは32歳であった。約1521年にイギリススフォルクロウアムでElizabeth Goldinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Drury(이)가 1479년 영국 수폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Drury(은)는 -8세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Felton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1521년 영국 수폴크 루그함에서 Elizabeth Goldingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Drury nasceu em 1479, em Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Drury, tinha -8 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Felton, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Goldingham aproximadamente 1521, em Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1556, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Drury родился в 1479 г. в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Drury было -8 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Felton, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Goldingham около 1521 г. в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1556 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Drury nació en 1479, en Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Drury, tenía -8 años y su mamá, Margaret Felton, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Goldingham aproximadamente 1521, en Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1556, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
